segments.text: Blow ye the trumpet in Zion, and sound an alarm in my holy mountain: let all the inhabitants of the land tremble: for the day of the LORD cometh, for it is nigh at hand;
segments.speaker: Joel

segments.text: A day of darkness and of gloominess, a day of clouds and of thick darkness, as the morning spread upon the mountains: a great people and a strong; there hath not been ever the like, neither shall be any more after it, even to the years of many generations.
segments.speaker: Joel

footnotes: of many…: Heb. of generation and generation

segments.text: A fire devoureth before them; and behind them a flame burneth: the land is as the garden of Eden before them, and behind them a desolate wilderness; yea, and nothing shall escape them.
segments.speaker: Joel

segments.text: The appearance of them is as the appearance of horses; and as horsemen, so shall they run.
segments.speaker: Joel

segments.text: Like the noise of chariots on the tops of mountains shall they leap, like the noise of a flame of fire that devoureth the stubble, as a strong people set in battle array.
segments.speaker: Joel

segments.text: Before their face the people shall be much pained: all faces shall gather blackness.
segments.speaker: Joel

segments.text: They shall run like mighty men; they shall climb the wall like men of war; and they shall march every one on his ways, and they shall not break their ranks:
segments.speaker: Joel

segments.text: Neither shall one thrust another; they shall walk every one in his path: and when they fall upon the sword, they shall not be wounded.
segments.speaker: Joel

segments.text: They shall run to and fro in the city; they shall run upon the wall, they shall climb up upon the houses; they shall enter in at the windows like a thief.
segments.speaker: Joel

segments.text: The earth shall quake before them; the heavens shall tremble: the sun and the moon shall be dark, and the stars shall withdraw their shining:
segments.speaker: Joel

segments.text: And the LORD shall utter his voice before his army: for his camp is very great: for he is strong that executeth his word: for the day of the LORD is great and very terrible; and who can abide it?
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Therefore also now, saith the LORD, turn ye even to me with all your heart, and with fasting, and with weeping, and with mourning:
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: And rend your heart, and not your garments, and turn unto the LORD your God: for he is gracious and merciful, slow to anger, and of great kindness, and repenteth him of the evil.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Who knoweth if he will return and repent, and leave a blessing behind him; even a meat offering and a drink offering unto the LORD your God?
segments.speaker: Joel

segments.text: Blow the trumpet in Zion, sanctify a fast, call a solemn assembly:
segments.speaker: Joel

segments.text: Gather the people, sanctify the congregation, assemble the elders, gather the children, and those that suck the breasts: let the bridegroom go forth of his chamber, and the bride out of her closet.
segments.speaker: Joel

segments.text: Spare thy people, O LORD, and give not thine heritage to reproach, that the heathen should rule over them: wherefore should they say among the people, Where is their God?
segments.speaker: Priests

footnotes: rule over: or, use a byword against

segments.text: Then will the LORD be jealous for his land, and pity his people.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Yea, the LORD will answer and say unto his people, Behold, I will send you corn, and wine, and oil, and ye shall be satisfied therewith: and I will no more make you a reproach among the heathen:
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: But I will remove far off from you the northern army, and will drive him into a land barren and desolate, with his face toward the east sea, and his hinder part toward the utmost sea, and his stink shall come up, and his ill savour shall come up, because he hath done great things.
segments.speaker: The LORD

footnotes: hath…: Heb. hath magnified to do

segments.text: Fear not, O land; be glad and rejoice: for the LORD will do great things.
segments.speaker: The LORD

footnotes: will…: Heb. hath magnified to do
heading: Restoration Promised

segments.text: Be not afraid, ye beasts of the field: for the pastures of the wilderness do spring, for the tree beareth her fruit, the fig tree and the vine do yield their strength.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Be glad then, ye children of Zion, and rejoice in the LORD your God: for he hath given you the former rain moderately, and he will cause to come down for you the rain, the former rain, and the latter rain in the first month.
segments.speaker: The LORD

footnotes: the former rain moderately: or, a teacher of righteousness

segments.text: And the floors shall be full of wheat, and the fats shall overflow with wine and oil.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: And I will restore to you the years that the locust hath eaten, the cankerworm, and the caterpiller, and the palmerworm, my great army which I sent among you.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: And ye shall eat in plenty, and be satisfied, and praise the name of the LORD your God, that hath dealt wondrously with you: and my people shall never be ashamed.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: And ye shall know that I am in the midst of Israel, and that I am the LORD your God, and none else: and my people shall never be ashamed.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: And it shall come to pass afterward, that I will pour out my spirit upon all flesh; and your sons and your daughters shall prophesy, your old men shall dream dreams, your young men shall see visions:
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: And also upon the servants and upon the handmaids in those days will I pour out my spirit.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: And I will shew wonders in the heavens and in the earth, blood, and fire, and pillars of smoke.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: The sun shall be turned into darkness, and the moon into blood, before the great and the terrible day of the LORD come.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: And it shall come to pass, that whosoever shall call on the name of the LORD shall be delivered: for in mount Zion and in Jerusalem shall be deliverance, as the LORD hath said, and in the remnant whom the LORD shall call.
segments.speaker: The LORD
